codeReview.summary: Both docs/api/cli.md and docs/api/nanoterm.md were created with comprehensive content. CLI reference covers server/client commands, all options with types/defaults, environment variables, exit codes, and protocol details. NanoTerm docs cover installation, options (fontSize, fontFamily, cursorStyle, cursorBlink, scrollback, theme), and methods (write, resize, onData, onResize, onTitle, onFocus, onBlur, clear, getSelection, copyToClipboard, destroy). Build passes. No blocking issues found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure says to run 'bun run docs:dev' and manually verify pages render, navigation works, no console errors. The worker skipped the interactive verification step (docs:dev was not run, no interactiveChecks performed). The handoff shows skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true despite this deviation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: after docs:build succeeded, worker immediately proceeded to commit without running docs:dev. Handoff verification.commandsRun shows only docs:build, no docs:dev. skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true but skill procedure step 5 (Test Locally) was not executed.

summary: Feature api-reference-pages reviewed successfully. docs/api/cli.md documents server and client commands with all options (port, secret, no-secret, no-totp, totp-reset, no-approval, allow-localhost/dev, tailscale, quiet) including types, defaults, and descriptions. Environment variables section includes SHELLPORT_SECRET and SHELLPORT_APPROVAL_MODE. Exit codes (0, 1, 1011) documented. docs/api/nanoterm.md documents standalone library usage with all required options (fontSize, fontFamily, cursorStyle, cursorBlink, scrollback, theme) and methods (write, resize, onData, onResize). Build passes. One non-blocking observation: worker skipped the interactive docs:dev verification step per skill procedure.
